positive: A stylized illustration of a whimsical astronaut floating among oversized geometric flora, set against a deep indigo and nebula-purple cosmic background. The astronaut wears a vintage, retro-futuristic bubble helmet and carries a stylized potted Earth seedling. Focus on clean line work, strong silhouettes, and high contrast. Use a limited, harmonious color palette of teal, burnt orange, gold, and deep violet. The composition must be centralized and symmetrical, suitable for a chest print on a t-shirt. Flat graphic design style, vector art quality, pop art influence, clean edges, isolated elements, studio lighting, ultra-detailed, high resolution.
negative: blurry, low quality, realistic photography, text, watermark, signature, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grain, noise, complex background clutter, logos, copyrighted
